data.title: SCENTMATIC's AI "KAORIUM" showcased at London's Selfridges for THAMEEN Fragrance launch event,  June 5-11, 2025. €2.82B UK fragrance market by 2033.
data.description: Based in London, SCENTMATIC Inc., a prominent company in scent digitalization, unveiled their innovative scent-to-language technology, KAORIUM, at the THAMEEN Fragrance new product debut event. The event was held at Selfridges department store in London from June 5 to 11, 2025. With Europe at the forefront of the global fragrance market, the UK specifically is anticipated to achieve a market value of US$2.82 billion by 2033. Acknowledging this potential, SCENTMATIC is swiftly broadening its international presence.

data.title: Shanghai launches 'Easy Go' platform for intl visitors to boost inbound consumption.
data.description: Shanghai introduced the "Easy Go" digital platform on July 4, 2025, through english.shanghai.gov.cn. This platform offers a variety of services for international visitors, with the goal of enhancing the city's inbound consumption.

data.title: WIC announced Digital Silk Road Development Forum in Quanzhou on July 24 at press conference in Beijing on July 3.
data.description: In Beijing on July 3, The World Internet Conference (WIC) announced the upcoming 2025 WIC Digital Silk Road Development Forum in Quanzhou, Fujian province. The forum is scheduled for July 24 and aims to discuss digital connectivity and cooperation.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures down as US markets closed; Uber and 4 others rise, Tesla falls post robotaxi launch.
data.description: The recent surge in the stock market has reached record levels as the Fourth of July holiday approaches. Tesla's stock has declined following the launch of their robotaxi, whereas Uber's stock has experienced a significant increase. Dow Jones Futures are falling as U.S. markets are closed, with Uber, a competitor of Tesla, leading a group of five stocks showing promise in entering buy zones.

data.title: Global Switchgear Market to reach $136.65 billion by 2030 with 5.7% CAGR growth from $103.71 billion in 2025.
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida, on July 4, 2025, it was reported that the worldwide Switchgear Market is projected to experience a substantial growth from an estimated value of USD 103.71 billion in 2025 to USD 136.65 billion by the year 2030. This growth represents a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 5.7% during the forecast period. The expansion of the global Switchgear Market is attributed to various factors and is expected to have a significant impact in the coming years.
